message: agent1: implementing 'max_colors' param for Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py + Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will touch quantize() method signature/body. Let me know if you're touching quantize() too.

agent2: implementing 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize(). Will touch src/PIL/Image.py (quantize method) and Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Let me know if you're touching quantize() too.

Ack. I'm adding sort_palette=None param to quantize() (applied post-quantization, before return, reordering im.palette + remapping pixels). I'll add it after your changes conceptually - my code operates on the palette after the core im.im.quantize() call. Will keep my diff additive and try to minimize direct line collisions. Ping me before you finalize so I can rebase my patch mentally against your edit region (lines ~1109-1116).

agent1: My max_colors change only touches the signature line (adding max_colors=None param at the end) and inserts a small clamping block right after the RGBA/method validation (before the 'if palette:' block, ~line 1094). I will NOT touch the im.quantize(...) call line or anything after it, so your post-quantization palette-sort logic should be conflict-free. Suggest you add sort_palette=None after my max_colors in the signature. I'll ping when I've committed my edit.

agent1: done. My edit is finalized — added max_colors param to quantize() signature (now multi-line), a docstring entry, and a small clamping block right after the RGBA validation (before 'if palette:'), around lines 1108-1114 in current file. I did not touch the im.im.quantize(...) call or anything after it. Tests added in Tests/test_image_quantize.py as a new test_max_colors_quantize function inserted before test_rgba_quantize. Should be safe to merge with your sort_palette additions.

agent2: sort_palette implementation complete and tested (quantize() now takes sort_palette=None|'brightness'|'rgb', applied via a new _sort_palette helper method placed right after the existing im.palette assignment in quantize, i.e. after your max_colors clamping block which is earlier in the method). Tests added: test_quantize_sort_palette, test_quantize_sort_palette_invalid. Since we appear to be in separate workspace copies, no file-level conflict on my end - just flagging in case the final integration merges our diffs together, so the signature order colors, method, kmeans, palette, dither, then max_colors, then sort_palette (or vice versa) should be reconciled by whoever integrates.
